mapper.sql: id, bucket_name, object_key, version_id, file_size, file_name, content_type, content_md5, crc64, storage_class, object_type, is_directory, is_symlink, symlink_target, acl, upload_id, part_count, position, restore_status, expiry_time, etag, user_metadata, tags, upload_ip, upload_time, last_access_time, access_count, download_count, status, created_by, created_time, updated_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM object_metadata WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND object_key = #{objectKey} AND version_id IS NULL AND status = 'active' LIMIT 1

SELECT FROM object_metadata WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND object_key LIKE CONCAT(#{prefix}, '%') AND status = 'active' ORDER BY object_key ASC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT FROM object_metadata WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY upload_time DESC
SELECT FROM object_metadata WHERE created_by = #{createdBy} AND status = 'active' ORDER BY upload_time DESC
SELECT FROM object_metadata WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY upload_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO object_metadata ( bucket_name, object_key, version_id, file_size, file_name, content_type, content_md5, crc64, storage_class, object_type, is_directory, is_symlink, symlink_target, acl, upload_id, part_count, position, restore_status, expiry_time, etag, user_metadata, tags, upload_ip, upload_time, last_access_time, access_count, download_count, status, created_by ) VALUES ( #{bucketName}, #{objectKey}, #{versionId}, #{fileSize}, #{fileName}, #{contentType}, #{contentMd5}, #{crc64}, #{storageClass}, #{objectType}, #{isDirectory}, #{isSymlink}, #{symlinkTarget}, #{acl}, #{uploadId}, #{partCount}, #{position}, #{restoreStatus}, #{expiryTime}, #{etag}, #{userMetadata}, #{tags}, #{uploadIp}, #{uploadTime}, #{lastAccessTime}, #{accessCount}, #{downloadCount}, #{status}, #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO object_metadata ( bucket_name, object_key, version_id, file_size, file_name, content_type, content_md5, crc64, storage_class, object_type, is_directory, is_symlink, symlink_target, acl, upload_id, part_count, position, restore_status, expiry_time, etag, user_metadata, tags, upload_ip, upload_time, last_access_time, access_count, download_count, status, created_by ) VALUES
(#{item.bucketName}, #{item.objectKey}, #{item.versionId}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.fileName}, #{item.contentType}, #{item.contentMd5}, #{item.crc64}, #{item.storageClass}, #{item.objectType}, #{item.isDirectory}, #{item.isSymlink}, #{item.symlinkTarget}, #{item.acl}, #{item.uploadId}, #{item.partCount}, #{item.position}, #{item.restoreStatus}, #{item.expiryTime}, #{item.etag}, #{item.userMetadata}, #{item.tags}, #{item.uploadIp}, #{item.uploadTime}, #{item.lastAccessTime}, #{item.accessCount}, #{item.downloadCount}, #{item.status}, #{item.createdBy})
mapper.update:
UPDATE object_metadata
file_size = #{fileSize}, file_name = #{fileName}, content_type = #{contentType}, storage_class = #{storageClass}, acl = #{acl}, user_metadata = #{userMetadata}, tags = #{tags},
WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND object_key = #{objectKey} AND status = 'active'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM object_metadata WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND status = 'active'
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(file_size), 0) FROM object_metadata WHERE bucket_name = #{bucketName} AND status = 'active'
